narrative:
DRIVER
GBP leads H4 CSM at 100 vs D1 at 0, a 100-point divergence that is the highest-priority short-term signal in this brief, overriding the D1 neutral read and flagging an aggressive intraday move already underway in GBP pairs. GBPUSD H4 Strong Sell at -5 with USDCHF H4 Buy at +4 and their -0.77 correlation confirm the same USD bid, making GBPUSD the cleanest short and GBPJPY the amplified expression given its +0.91 correlation to cable. AUD D1 CSM fades from 100 to H4 57 while AUDJPY holds D1 Strong Buy with H4 momentum at 73, so AUDJPY longs remain valid but size must reflect the AUD fading divergence warning.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: USDJPY CMP 52 with H4 momentum 78 rising sharply, USDCHF CMP 52 with H4 momentum 75 rising sharply
Fading: EURJPY CMP 40 with H4 momentum 39 falling, GBPJPY CMP 41 with H4 momentum 36 falling

WATCH
RBA minutes release hits AUDUSD directly, a hawkish surprise reactivates the D1 AUD 100 CSM read and invalidates the fade signal
China data print moves AUDJPY as CNY weakness amplifies AUD pressure through the +0.87 AUDUSD correlation cluster
Copper extended decline below 6.57 triggers USDCAD upside continuation given USDCAD H4 Buy at +3 and commodity-linked CAD exposure

themes.theme: USD strength on resilient US economic data
Rising US yields supporting USD and pressuring commodities
JPY strength amid USD rally and rising yields
AUD weakness ahead of RBA minutes and China data
CNY weakness with USD/CNH extending lower to targets
Commodity price weakness driven by dollar strength
Gold and silver decline on strong USD and risk sentiment shift
Fed holding pattern extends into 2027 limiting rate cuts
Risk-on sentiment with equity markets at record highs

key_observation: Strong US retail sales and resilient economic data are driving USD rallies and rising yields. This is pressuring commodity prices across the board while supporting safe-haven JPY. AUD faces headwinds from China concerns, while CNY weakens further. Equity markets remain strong on tech strength, supporting risk-on conditions despite commodity weakness.
watch: RBA minutes release timing, China economic data, US-China trade negotiations progress, Fed rate cut expectations for 2027, and further USD momentum impact on emerging market currencies and commodity-linked currencies like AUD.
